title: Help Center QA + verification + closeout
description: npm run build (all /help pages static, no type errors), /help public logged-out, sidebar order, breadcrumbs/prev-next, mobile collapse, MDX components render, screenshots load, sitemap lists help URLs, accuracy spot-check 3 pages vs SCREEN-MAP.md. Update docs/help-center-plan.md, close beads. Executor: sonnet subagent + main agent review.
close_reason: QA complete: build green (40 static pages), /help serves 200 logged-out, frontmatter metadata + sitemap(40 URLs) + robots verified via curl on prod server, screenshots serve, 109 links/27 screenshot refs intact. Accuracy spot-check found+fixed: stale Quest Board 'Reading Now/Up Next' sections (SCREEN-MAP.md itself stale — actual UI is one board + collapsible Completed), Start Reading action existed contrary to page, R{n} reread dots, MiniPlayer comment entry point, reveal notification condition, onboarding lands on Guild tab not Library, joined-guild book title not actually shown, skip affordances corrected. Also fixed speed/skip ranges (0.5-3x, 5-90s).

title: Help infra: MDX pipeline, /help routes, docs layout, MDX components
description: Install next-mdx-remote, gray-matter, @tailwindcss/typography, remark-gfm, rehype-slug, rehype-autolink-headings. Build lib/help loader (getHelpTree/getPageBySlug/getAllPages/getAdjacentPages), app/help layout + landing + [...slug] route, components/help (sidebar, breadcrumbs, prev/next, mdx-components: Callout/Steps/Screenshot/PlatformBadge/Kbd), .prose-tavern typography in globals.css, 2 seed pages proving the pipeline. Executor: main agent (complex).
close_reason: Infra: MDX pipeline (next-mdx-remote/rsc), lib/help loader, /help routes+layout+sidebar, MDX components, prose-tavern CSS, 2 seed pages, build green. Style guide + 8 _section.json done by opus subagent.

title: Help content style guide + section skeletons
description: Write docs/help-content-style-guide.md (voice per docs/STYLE_GUIDE.md, frontmatter contract, MDX component usage rules, terminology glossary: Guild, Quest Board, Tavern, New Read+, Ghost Markers, Adventurers; screenshot rules) and create all 8 content/help/<section>/_section.json files. Executor: opus subagent.
close_reason: Infra: MDX pipeline (next-mdx-remote/rsc), lib/help loader, /help routes+layout+sidebar, MDX components, prose-tavern CSS, 2 seed pages, build green. Style guide + 8 _section.json done by opus subagent.

title: Help Center: public /help product docs section
description: Wiki-like product documentation for the entire Squabble app (library, ABS, player, guilds/quests, progress, settings, troubleshooting) served at /help on squabble-web. MDX content in content/help/, rendered via next-mdx-remote/rsc. Plan: docs/help-center-plan.md
notes: v1 shipped 2026-07-05 on feat/help-center (cd0e988, pushed). All tasks closed except b4d.14 (Cmd+K search, deferred backlog). Epic stays open only for that.

title: E1 — ABS web streaming (no downloads)
description: Stream a book from the user's ABS server in the browser via hybrid transport (direct <audio>+token, /api/abs/stream proxy fallback). Port absService into shared abstracting RN device-info; IndexedDB token store; minimal transport to prove playback; ABS session + Firestore progress sync. See docs/web-parity/02-abs-streaming-spec.md.
acceptance_criteria: From web: connect to ABS, browse library, pick a book, it streams and plays (direct or proxy), seeking works, position syncs to ABS and Firestore ghost markers. No file downloaded.
notes:
ABS already returns audioTracks[].contentUrl (unused by native). Reuse shared absStore + absIntegrationConfig as-is.
Refreshed 2026-07-06: plan now in squabble-react-native/docs/vision/web-parity-spec.md + web-parity-implementation.md. Tasks carry model-* routing labels (opus/sonnet/haiku) + per-task implementation notes. New children: rq4.7 multi-track engine (CRITICAL PATH), rq4.8 transport probe/fallback, rq4.9 ABS browse + Listen entry points. Corrections vs old doc 02: mixed content blocks http servers entirely; proxy token custody = HttpOnly cookie (no server-side token store); multi-track is mandatory.

title: E0 — Web joins the monorepo (apps/web + @squabble/shared)
description: Move squabble-web into the squabble-react-native Turborepo as apps/web so it imports @squabble/shared directly (single source of truth). Foundation epic — blocks ABS streaming, theming, and all social-parity reuse. See docs/web-parity/01-monorepo-migration.md.
acceptance_criteria: Web runs as @squabble/web in the Turborepo; imports @squabble/shared (firebase app/auth/db + models); pnpm/turbo build+lint+typecheck pass; existing web screens regression-free.
notes:
Key fact: only 1/91 shared/src files imports react-native. Shared peerDeps: firebase ^11, react, zustand (no RN/expo). Use transpilePackages:['@squabble/shared'] in next.config.ts.
Refreshed 2026-07-06: plan now in squabble-react-native/docs/vision/web-parity-spec.md + web-parity-implementation.md. Tasks carry model-* routing labels (opus/sonnet/haiku) + per-task implementation notes. New children: b8t.7 Vercel migration, b8t.8 shared-firebase bundling fixes, b8t.9 rules/index/auth-domain audit. b8t.1-.5 strictly sequential; .7/.8/.9 parallel after .2.

title: E4.6 Keyboard shortcuts (player)
description: Space play/pause, ArrowLeft/Right skip +/-30s, ArrowUp/Down speed; scoped to ignore form inputs/textareas; complements MediaSession hardware keys.
acceptance_criteria: Shortcuts work globally while playing, never fire while typing in an input.

title: E3.8 Comment drafts (localStorage)
description: Persist in-progress comment/reply text per (bookId, position-bucket) key in localStorage; restore on reload; clear on successful post. Web analog of mobile's AsyncStorage commentDraft.ts.
acceptance_criteria: Typed comment text survives a page reload and clears after posting.

title: E3.9 Comment permalink migration (/note route)
description: Replace /note/[guildId]/[noteId] with a comment permalink route resolving via the guild fat-pointer (guilds/{gid}/comments); redirect old URLs. Old route breaks when useNotes -> shared comments (6cu.1).
acceptance_criteria: Old note deep-links redirect and resolve to the comment thread; new permalinks open the correct comment with gating respected.

title: E3.7 Adventurer presence display (currentlyListening)
description: Guild screen strip: parse each member's users/{uid}.currentlyListening via parseCurrentlyListening (models/user.ts) — book, position, playbackRate, staleness; idle state = 'at the tavern'. Members merged with live listening via shared subscribeToMemberListening. Depends on 6cu.5 landing the guild-screen social layout.
acceptance_criteria: Guild page shows live per-member listening state matching mobile's Adventurer Activity for the same guild.

title: E2.7 Spacing/radius/shadow CSS translation
description: Emit spacing.ts spacing/radius scales as CSS vars in the generator; hand-translate the RN-shaped shadow tokens (shadowColor/Offset/Opacity/Radius/elevation) to box-shadow equivalents per theme.
acceptance_criteria: Spacing/radius vars available theme-wide; shadows render equivalently to mobile across all 3 themes.

title: E2.6 Member-color token exception (BookCover, ProgressBarWithGhosts)
description: Replace hardcoded member/ghost hex arrays in components/BookCover.tsx and components/ProgressBarWithGhosts.tsx with --accent-purple/pink/teal/cyan theme vars; use the same shared member-index->color assignment function as mobile (import, do not reimplement).
acceptance_criteria: Member colors re-theme with the active theme; no literal hex left in those components.

title: E1.9 ABS library browse + Listen entry points
description: Pages under /(main)/listen: libraries -> items (?minified=1) -> item detail -> play. Plus a Listen button on guild-book detail matching guild book <-> ABS item via shared book matching (matchGuildBook / canonicalId+title). Covers the old gap-table promise of ABS browsing that had no task.
acceptance_criteria: Can browse/search a connected library and start playback from both the listen section and a guild book page.

title: E1.8 Transport probe + auto-fallback (direct vs proxy)
description: On connect: scheme check (http => hard fail with tailscale serve / TLS guidance), tiny ranged direct-fetch probe; persist transport: 'direct'|'proxy' on the connection. Media error during direct playback flips to proxy and reloads at position.
acceptance_criteria: CORS-blocked https server auto-falls back to proxy mid-play; http server shows guided error, never a silent failure.

title: E1.7 Multi-track playback engine (global position map, gapless src swap)
description: audioTracks[] from POST /api/items/{id}/play each carry contentUrl/startOffset/duration/mimeType. Build track map: global position <-> (trackIndex, offsetInTrack). Single primary <audio>; swap src at track end; preload next track (hidden second element or warm fetch) for near-gapless. Seek resolves through the map (may swap track + set currentTime). Scrubber/chapters/ghosts operate in global position space. Mobile only handles audioFiles[0] — streaming must not repeat that gap.
acceptance_criteria: A 3-file MP3 book plays across boundaries with correct scrubber domain and cross-boundary seek.

title: E0.9 Security-rules / index / auth-domain audit for web query patterns
description: Web newly issues: dual-query comments (bookId + canonicalId), feed (where guildId == orderBy revealedAt desc limit 50), tavern, epicQuests, guild progress. Mobile already runs these — confirm firestore.rules and firestore.indexes.json cover them; add missing composite indexes; add web origin to Firebase Auth authorized domains (feeds E7.1).
acceptance_criteria: All web queries run without missing-index or permission errors; web origin listed in Auth authorized domains.

title: E0.8 Shared-firebase web bundling fixes (AsyncStorage require, __DEV__)
description: packages/shared/src/firebase/config.ts does require('@react-native-async-storage/async-storage') in try/catch and references __DEV__ — both trip Next bundling. Guard in shared (preferred) or alias-to-false in next.config.ts. Confirm firestoreInstrumented.ts runs clean on web. Never call connectToEmulators() from web. Keep shared memoryLocalCache for v1.
acceptance_criteria: next build succeeds importing @squabble/shared firebase exports; no AsyncStorage resolution errors; mobile unaffected.

title: E0.7 Vercel deploy migration (monorepo repoint)
description: Repoint the Vercel project to the squabble-react-native repo: Root Directory apps/web, install via pnpm, ignoreCommand 'npx turbo-ignore @squabble/web'. Drop vercel.json npm buildCommand; carry over env vars; verify preview deploys serve.
acceptance_criteria: Preview deploy from the monorepo builds and serves the web app; production domain unaffected until cutover.

title: Help landing polish + cross-link pass
description: After all content lands: polish /help landing (section cards, popular articles), add cross-links between related pages. Executor: sonnet subagent.
close_reason: Landing: Start-here strip (4 curated articles, loader-driven), section cards capped at 5 with View-all links. Cross-link pass: 109 internal links + 27 screenshot refs all verified, zero broken. tsc clean.

title: E3.1 Replace web useNotes with shared comments (spoiler + reread gating)

Refresh 2026-07-06 (size L, SPOILER-CRITICAL): delete hooks/useNotes.ts; consume shared services/comments.ts + commentsStore + useComments hooks. Preserve VERBATIM: (1) visibility order own -> milestone -> rereadGated -> soloQuest -> progress% (isCommentVisibleToUser, models/comment.ts); (2) root docs at users/{uid}/comments with fat-pointer fan-out to guilds/{gid}/comments; (3) dual subscription on bookId AND canonicalId merged client-side. UI: comment list on book detail + composer at current position.
Routing: opus — a visibility-order bug is a user-facing spoiler.

Refresh 2026-07-06 (size M): next-themes ThemeProvider attribute="data-theme", themes=['hearthfire','sanctuaryMoon','dragonfire'], defaultTheme='sanctuaryMoon', enableSystem={false}; remove className="dark" from app/layout.tsx; keep color-scheme: dark (all 3 themes are dark). No FOUC on cold load.
Routing: sonnet.

title: E2.2 Map shadcn semantic vars onto Squabble tokens
description: One mapping across all themes: --background->bgBase, --primary->brand, --card/--popover->bgRaised, --border/--input->borderSubtle, --destructive->error, charts->accent*, etc. Expose native-only tokens + spacing/radius scale.
acceptance_criteria: shadcn components render correctly in all 3 themes using mapped tokens.
notes:
Refresh 2026-07-06 (size M): mapping lives in app/globals.css @theme inline (Tailwind v4, no config file): --background->bg-base, --card/--popover->bg-raised, --primary->brand, --primary-foreground->text-on-brand, --border/--input->border-subtle, --destructive->error, --muted-foreground->text-muted, charts->accent tokens. Keep Squabble-native vars exposed alongside.
Routing: sonnet.

title: E2.1 Generate per-theme CSS-variable blocks from tokens.ts
description: Emit [data-theme=hearthfire|sanctuaryMoon|dragonfire] CSS-variable blocks generated from shared theme/tokens.ts so values never drift from native.
acceptance_criteria: Three data-theme blocks exist, generated from tokens.ts.
notes:
Refresh 2026-07-06 (size S): generator apps/web/scripts/generate-theme-css.ts imports @squabble/shared theme/tokens.ts + spacing.ts; emits app/themes.generated.css with one [data-theme="..."] block per theme (28 color tokens + typography scale as CSS vars). Wire as predev/prebuild script; COMMIT the generated file so Vercel builds don't need ts-node.
Routing: haiku — mechanical generation, spec is exact.

title: E1.6 ABS session sync + Firestore progress sync
description: Port useABSSessionSync (start session, 5-min /api/session/:id/sync, close on stop, backoff on failure, progress PATCH fallback). Reuse shared userProgress.saveUserProgress for guild ghost markers.
acceptance_criteria: Position syncs to ABS and to Firestore; a guildmate sees the ghost move.
notes:
Refresh 2026-07-06 (size M): port mobile useABSSessionSync RN-free: open session on play; POST /api/session/{id}/sync {currentTime, timeListened, duration} every 5 min + on pause; close on book change and pagehide/visibilitychange with navigator.sendBeacon fallback; PATCH /api/me/progress/{id} direct fallback with mobile's exponential backoff. Firestore side calls shared services/sync.ts UNCHANGED (throttle, syncCache, forceSync, 3-target fan-out incl. currentlyListening — web presence comes free here).
Routing: sonnet.

title: E1.5 Proxy fallback route /api/abs/stream
description: Next.js route that looks up the ABS token server-side, forwards Range, and streams the body same-origin (pass through 206/Content-Range/Accept-Ranges). Client auto-falls-back when direct fails and persists proxy-required.
acceptance_criteria: Books stream via proxy when direct CORS is blocked; seeking works; token never on client URL.
notes:
Refresh 2026-07-06 (size M): TOKEN CUSTODY REDESIGN (old spec's server-side token lookup is impossible — tokens are client-only). Add app/api/abs/session/route.ts minting an HttpOnly, Secure, path-scoped (/api/abs) cookie carrying encrypted {serverUrl, token} (key in env var). app/api/abs/stream/route.ts reads cookie, forwards Range, passes through 206/Content-Range/Accept-Ranges/Content-Type, streams body via ReadableStream piping — never buffer. Verify Vercel response-duration limits with ranged chunks.
Routing: opus — Range/206 correctness + token custody.

title: E1.4 Direct streaming path (<audio> + token query param)
description: Build <audio> src from audioTracks[].contentUrl?token=...; map global position to (trackIndex, offset) for multi-track books; CORS probe on connect to detect direct viability.
acceptance_criteria: A book plays directly when ABS CORS allows; seeking works.
notes:
Refresh 2026-07-06 (size L): web player engine apps/web/lib/player/engine.ts + shared playerStore for state; POST /api/items/{id}/play {deviceInfo, forceDirectPlay:true}; direct mode plays ${contentUrl}?token=${token} (https only); minimal transport UI (play/pause/±30s) proves the slice. rq4.7 layers the multi-track map on top — keep the engine track-agnostic at the seam.
Routing: opus — core streaming engine.

title: E1.3 ABS connection UI (single active connection)
description: Form for serverUrl/username/password + validate against ABS; surface connection state via shared absStore. Scope v1 to one active connection.
acceptance_criteria: User can connect a web session to an ABS server and see libraries.
notes:
Refresh 2026-07-06 (size M): /settings/abs page; server URL + username/password -> POST /login (Bearer user.token); show reachability diagnosis from rq4.8 (http = hard fail with tailscale serve / TLS guidance); single active connection; reconnect prompt via shared useABSReconnectPrompt if portable.
Routing: sonnet.

title: E1.2 IndexedDB ABS token store (web analog of expo-secure-store)
description: Store ABS token in IndexedDB keyed by connectionId, same interface as absConnectionService. Reuse shared absIntegrationConfig for non-sensitive Firestore metadata + reconnect.
acceptance_criteria: Web persists/reads ABS token via IndexedDB; reconnect survives cleared storage via Firestore metadata.
notes:
Refresh 2026-07-06 (size S): apps/web/lib/abs/tokenStore.ts on IndexedDB (idb-keyval fine), API mirrors mobile absConnectionService (saveConnection/getActiveConnection/clearConnection). Non-secret metadata continues to Firestore via shared absIntegrationConfig (users/{uid}/integrations/abs). Token NEVER in Firestore or localStorage.
Routing: sonnet.

title: E1.1 Port absService into @squabble/shared (abstract RN device-info)
description: Move apps/mobile/src/services/absService.ts to shared as absClient; replace Platform + expo-application with an injected DeviceInfoProvider; web supplies browser device info. Mobile keeps importing the same module.
acceptance_criteria: Shared absClient compiles with no RN/expo imports; mobile + web both consume it.
notes:
Refresh 2026-07-06 (size M): new file packages/shared/src/services/absClient.ts ported from apps/mobile/src/services/absService.ts. Extract DeviceInfoProvider interface ({clientName, clientVersion, deviceName, ...}); mobile keeps a thin adapter supplying Platform/expo-application; web supplies UA-derived info. Port normalizeServerUrl but the WEB variant must REJECT http (mixed content) rather than exempt private ranges. Mobile must be re-pointed at the shared module and regression-tested — that is why this is opus.
Routing: opus — shared-surface refactor touching mobile.

title: E0.6 Workspace green; existing web screens regression-free
description: turbo build/lint/typecheck pass for @squabble/web; manual pass of library, book detail, guild, invite, auth screens.
acceptance_criteria: All quality gates pass; existing web flows work unchanged.
notes:
Refresh 2026-07-06 (size M): regression surfaces = login, guild create/join, /invite/[code], library, book detail (notes+topics+ghost bar), help center, Hardcover search. Plus: turbo build green for BOTH @squabble/web and @squabble/mobile (proves firebase decision didn't ripple).
Routing: sonnet.

title: E0.5 Adopt shared models, replace lib/firebase/types.ts
description: Swap web-local Firestore types for @squabble/shared models (User, Guild, GuildBook, Comment, Topic). Reconcile field drift (web Note/Progress vs shared Comment/userProgress) incrementally per feature.
acceptance_criteria: Web screens compile against shared models; no field-drift regressions.
notes:
Refresh 2026-07-06 (size L): delete lib/firebase/types.ts incrementally; map web Note -> shared Comment, web progress -> shared userProgress shapes. Scope = types-compile-green ONLY; the 7 web hooks (useGuild, useGuildBooks, useProgress, useGuildProgress, useNotes, useTopics, useHardcover) are retyped here but rewired in their feature epics (E3 etc.), not here.
Routing: sonnet.

title: E0.4 Adopt shared firebase (app/auth/db) in web
description: Replace lib/firebase/config.ts usage with shared app/auth/db from @squabble/shared. Keep firebase-admin + Hardcover/waitlist API routes web-only. Confirm NEXT_PUBLIC_FIREBASE_* feed shared client config.
acceptance_criteria: Web auth + Firestore run through @squabble/shared firebase; admin routes unchanged.
notes:
Refresh 2026-07-06 (size M): swap lib/firebase/config.ts imports for shared app/auth/db exports; keep lib/firebase/admin.ts + Hardcover/waitlist API routes web-local; never call connectToEmulators() from web. Zustand stores are module singletons — 'use client' components only; audit for App Router SSR leakage. Pairs with b8t.8 (bundling fixes).
Routing: sonnet.

title: E0.3 Reconcile dependency versions (firebase, react, zustand)
description: Standardize firebase major (web 12 vs shared peer ^11), reconcile react 19.1/19.2, add zustand. Single lockfile; one firebase instance.
acceptance_criteria: One resolved firebase/react/zustand across the workspace; no duplicate firebase.
notes:
Refresh 2026-07-06 (size M): DECISION — standardize on firebase ^11 for v1: downgrade web ^12.7.0 -> ^11.x (shared peer ^11.0.0 EXCLUDES 12.x, contra old doc 01; mobile is on ^11). Rejected alternative: widen peer to ^11||^12 (pnpm dual-instance + TS type-identity footgun). Coordinated 12-bump = future bead. React: web 19.2.x + mobile 19.1.x coexist (both satisfy shared peer). Add zustand ^5 to web.
Routing: opus — version decision ripples into mobile.

title: E0.2 Wire workspace + Next transpilePackages for @squabble/shared
description: Add @squabble/shared: workspace:* to web; set transpilePackages:['@squabble/shared'] in next.config.ts; confirm pnpm install links it and turbo run dev --filter @squabble/web boots.
acceptance_criteria: Web boots via turbo and can import from @squabble/shared.
notes:
Refresh 2026-07-06 (size S): add "@squabble/shared": "workspace:*"; transpilePackages: ['@squabble/shared'] in next.config.ts (shared ships TS source, main: ./src/index.ts); align ESLint/tsconfig (web keeps its flat config).
Routing: sonnet.

title: E0.1 Land squabble-web as apps/web (@squabble/web)
description: Move the squabble-web tree under squabble-react-native/apps/web; rename package to @squabble/web; keep Next 16 / React 19. Repo history strategy decided at execution.
acceptance_criteria: apps/web exists in the monorepo and builds standalone.
notes:
Refresh 2026-07-06 (size M): git subtree add --prefix apps/web ../squabble-web main (preserves history); rename pkg to @squabble/web; delete package-lock.json / node_modules / tsconfig.tsbuildinfo; pnpm-workspace.yaml already globs apps/*; verify turbo.json build outputs include .next/**. Decide beads-db location (default: travels with the tree). Archive old repo with pointer README after cutover.
Routing: opus — repo surgery + history preservation.

title: E4 — Player-adjacent UX (chapters, speed, sleep timer, bookmarks, miniplayer)
description: Full player UX parity on top of the E1 streaming engine: chapter picker/nav, variable speed 0.5-2.0x, sleep timer, bookmarks, scrubber with chapter + guild ghost markers, sticky MiniPlayer, MediaSession lock-screen controls. See docs/web-parity/04-feature-gap-analysis.md.
acceptance_criteria: Web player has chapter nav, speed, sleep timer, bookmarks, scrubber with ghost markers, MiniPlayer, and OS media controls.
notes: Reuse shared playerStore + bookmarksStore. Depends on E1 streaming engine.

title: E4 — Player-adjacent UX (chapters, speed, sleep timer, bookmarks, miniplayer)
description: Full player UX parity on top of the E1 streaming engine: chapter picker/nav, variable speed 0.5-2.0x, sleep timer, bookmarks, scrubber with chapter + guild ghost markers, sticky MiniPlayer, MediaSession lock-screen controls. See docs/web-parity/04-feature-gap-analysis.md.
acceptance_criteria: Web player has chapter nav, speed, sleep timer, bookmarks, scrubber with ghost markers, MiniPlayer, and OS media controls.
notes:
Reuse shared playerStore + bookmarksStore. Depends on E1 streaming engine.
Refreshed 2026-07-06: plan now in squabble-react-native/docs/vision/web-parity-spec.md + web-parity-implementation.md. Tasks carry model-* routing labels (opus/sonnet/haiku) + per-task implementation notes. New child: rpb.6 keyboard shortcuts. Wave 2: gated on rq4.4 + rq4.7 (global-position scrubber domain).

title: E3 — Social feature parity (comments, topics, tavern, feed)
description: Close the social gap that is the product's differentiation: timestamped comments with spoiler+reread gating, reactions, replies, milestones, reveal indicators; topics aligned to shared gating; tavern chat (guild-wide + per-book); guild activity feed; adventurer activity; solo quests; pinned quest. Almost entirely wiring shared services/stores/hooks to new UI. See docs/web-parity/04-feature-gap-analysis.md.
acceptance_criteria: Web comments/topics enforce the same spoiler+reread gating as native; reactions/replies/milestones work; tavern chat and activity feed live; behavior matches native for the same Firestore data.
notes:
Reuse shared: comments/topics/tavern/activity/soloQuest services + commentsStore/topicsStore/tavernStore/feedStore + useComments*/useTopics/useTavernChat/useFeed hooks (all web-safe).
Refreshed 2026-07-06: plan now in squabble-react-native/docs/vision/web-parity-spec.md + web-parity-implementation.md. Tasks carry model-* routing labels (opus/sonnet/haiku) + per-task implementation notes. New children: 6cu.7 adventurer presence, 6cu.8 comment drafts (localStorage), 6cu.9 permalink migration. Feed = server fan-out (users/{uid}/feed) — never port services/activity.ts.

title: E2 — Theming / tokenization (3 themes + user preference)
description: Render web in the same 3 themes as native (hearthfire/sanctuaryMoon/dragonfire) with a persisted user theme preference, replacing today's hardcoded dark theme. Tokens from shared theme/tokens.ts -> CSS variables keyed by data-theme; map shadcn semantic vars onto Squabble tokens; wire next-themes. Use claude_design MCP for visual previews. See docs/web-parity/03-theming-tokenization.md.
acceptance_criteria: All web screens render in each of the 3 themes; visible switcher changes whole app; choice persists across reloads; palette matches native ThemePreview.
notes:
Web can lead: native does NOT persist theme (resets to sanctuaryMoon). next-themes already a dependency, currently unused.
Refreshed 2026-07-06: plan now in squabble-react-native/docs/vision/web-parity-spec.md + web-parity-implementation.md. Tasks carry model-* routing labels (opus/sonnet/haiku) + per-task implementation notes. New children: 3z8.6 member-color token exception, 3z8.7 spacing/shadow CSS translation.

title: E7 — Auth parity (Google OAuth, password reset, onboarding)
description: Add Google OAuth sign-in, password reset email flow, and align onboarding (create/join guild, add first book) to native. Apple Sign-In is iOS-only and out of scope for web v1. See docs/web-parity/04-feature-gap-analysis.md.
acceptance_criteria: Web supports Google sign-in and password reset; onboarding flow matches native.
notes:
Firebase Auth web popup/redirect. Web already has email/password.
Refreshed 2026-07-06: plan now in squabble-react-native/docs/vision/web-parity-spec.md + web-parity-implementation.md. Tasks carry model-* routing labels (opus/sonnet/haiku) + per-task implementation notes. E7 is now explicitly IN SCOPE (user decision 2026-07-06): Google OAuth, password reset, onboarding alignment. No Apple Sign-In.

title: E6 — Epic Quests / series
description: Series definitions + guild adoption, per-member series progress, series-wide topics with progressive reveal, run-tier badges. See docs/web-parity/04-feature-gap-analysis.md.
acceptance_criteria: Web can view/adopt epic quests, show per-member series progress and series topics, render run-tier badges; matches native.
notes:
Reuse shared epicQuests service, epicQuestsStore, useEpicQuests; topics service with scope=series.
Refreshed 2026-07-06: plan now in squabble-react-native/docs/vision/web-parity-spec.md + web-parity-implementation.md. Tasks carry model-* routing labels (opus/sonnet/haiku) + per-task implementation notes. ORDER: 5a4.3 requires 6cu.3 (topics infra) first.

title: E6 — Epic Quests / series
description: Series definitions + guild adoption, per-member series progress, series-wide topics with progressive reveal, run-tier badges. See docs/web-parity/04-feature-gap-analysis.md.
acceptance_criteria: Web can view/adopt epic quests, show per-member series progress and series topics, render run-tier badges; matches native.
notes: Reuse shared epicQuests service, epicQuestsStore, useEpicQuests; topics service with scope=series.

title: E5 — Profile, achievements, notification preferences
description: Profile (display name, avatar color, equipped title, adventurer class), listening stats, title/achievement display, notification-preferences UI. Open sub-decision: web notification DELIVERY (web-push vs in-app only) — flagged, not assumed. See docs/web-parity/04-feature-gap-analysis.md.
acceptance_criteria: Web profile shows identity + stats + titles; notification preferences editable and persisted; web-push decision recorded.
notes: Reuse shared User model, userTitles, useUnlockedTitles, useNotificationPreferences.

title: Help Center: client-side search (Cmd+K, MiniSearch)
description: Deferred per user decision 2026-07-05. Build-time JSON index served from app/api/help/search-index, client dialog with MiniSearch fuzzy search. Not part of v1.
